framework.name: Compliance Framework Implementation Costs
framework.description: Production AI agents handling sensitive data need GDPR/HIPAA/SOC 2 compliance, adding $8K-$25K to development costs per framework. This quantifies governance infrastructure investment but not ongoing monitoring costs.
framework.raw_quote: Production AI agents handling sensitive data need GDPR/HIPAA/SOC 2 compliance, adding $8K-$25K to development costs per framework.

source.title: Enterprise AI Adoption Strategy: Complete 2025 Guide
